mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HC_MEMBER AS hm WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hm.MEM_ID = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hd.DEPT_CODE FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_CODE , (SELECT hd.DEPT_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_NAME , (SELECT hd.DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER AS hm WHERE hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' ) mem INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER_ROLE hmr ON mem.MEM_SEQ = hmr.MEM_SEQ AND mem.MEM_ID = hmr.MEM_ID WHERE 1=1

SELECT mem.*,hmr.ROLE_ID FROM ( SELECT
, (SELECT hd.DEPT_CODE FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_CODE , (SELECT hd.DEPT_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_NAME , (SELECT hd.DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_DEPT hd WHERE hd.DEPT_ID = hm.DEPT_ID) AS DEPT_ENG_NAME FROM HC_MEMBER AS hm WHERE hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' ) mem INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER_ROLE hmr ON mem.MEM_SEQ = hmr.MEM_SEQ AND mem.MEM_ID = hmr.MEM_ID WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY MEM_REG_DT DESC

SELECT al.REAL_DEPTH , al.MENU_SEQ , IFNULL(al.ROLE_ID, "") AS ROLE_ID , IFNULL(al.PAR_ID, "") AS PAR_ID , IFNULL(al.MENU_ID, "") AS MENU_ID , IFNULL(al.MENU_CODE, "") AS MENU_CODE , IFNULL(al.MENU_NAME, "") AS MENU_NAME , IFNULL(al.MENU_ENG_NAME, "") AS MENU_ENG_NAME , al.MENU_FULL_PATH , IFNULL(al.MENU_DEPTH, 0) AS MENU_DEPTH , IFNULL(al.MENU_ORDER, 0) AS MENU_ORDER , IFNULL(al.MENU_TYPE, 'unused') AS MENU_TYPE , IFNULL(al.MENU_STAT, 'use') AS MENU_STAT , IFNULL(al.MENU_REG_ID, "") AS MENU_REG_ID , al.MENU_REG_DT , al.MENU_REG_TIME , IFNULL(al.MENU_MOD_ID, "") AS MENU_MOD_ID , al.MENU_MOD_DT , al.MENU_MOD_TIME , IFNULL(al.MENU_URL, "") AS MENU_URL , IFNULL(hmm.MEM_SEQ, "") AS AUTH_MEM_SEQ , IFNULL(hmm.MEM_ID, "") AS AUTH_MEM_ID , IFNULL(hmm.MENU_ID, "") AS AUTH_MENU_ID , IFNULL(hmm.ROLE_ID, "") AS AUTH_ROLE_ID , IFNULL(hmm.MENU_USE, "") AS AUTH_MENU_USE FROM ( SELECT fnc.LEVEL AS REAL_DEPTH , hc_mn.MENU_SEQ , hc_mn.ROLE_ID , hc_mn.PAR_ID , hc_mn.MENU_ID , hc_mn.MENU_CODE , hc_mn.MENU_NAME , hc_mn.MENU_ENG_NAME , fnGetMenuFullPath(hc_mn.MENU_ID) AS MENU_FULL_PATH , hc_mn.MENU_DEPTH , hc_mn.MENU_ORDER , hc_mn.MENU_TYPE , hc_mn.MENU_STAT , hc_mn.MENU_REG_ID , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_REG_DT,'%Y%m%d') AS MENU_REG_DT , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_REG_DT,'%H%i%S') AS MENU_REG_TIME , hc_mn.MENU_MOD_ID , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_MOD_DT,'%Y%m%d') AS MENU_MOD_DT , DATE_FORMAT(hc_mn.MENU_MOD_DT,'%H%i%S') AS MENU_MOD_TIME , hc_mn.MENU_URL FROM ( SELECT FNGETMENUTREE() AS MENU_ID , @level AS LEVEL FROM (SELECT @start_with:=0, @menu_id:='system', @level:=0) vars JOIN HC_MENU hm ON hm.MENU_ID != 'system' WHERE @menu_id IS NOT NULL ) fnc LEFT JOIN HC_MENU hc_mn ON fnc.MENU_ID = hc_mn.MENU_ID ) al LEFT OUTER JOIN HC_MEMBER_MENU hmm ON al.MENU_ID = hmm.MENU_ID AND hmm.MEM_SEQ = #{seq} AND hmm.MEM_ID = #{memId} WHERE 1=1 AND al.MENU_STAT = 'use' AND (al.ROLE_ID = 'ALL' OR al.ROLE_ID = #{roleId})
